series_metadata.series_title: Hospitals and Home Health Agency Survey
series_metadata.series_description: Contains records generated by hospitals and home health agencies in the survey certification process. The information also serves to document compliance/noncompliance with state and federal regulations

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for 3 years after the hard copy is destroyed, then erase ; Paper: Retain for 3 years after the year in which the record was prepared, then destroy, Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Wastepaper
